summary: 2 film announcements, 2 TV announcements across 5 trades.

film.title: The Death of Robin Hood
film.announcement: Artisans break down Hugh Jackman's brutal transformation for the film.

film.title: The Beast
film.announcement: Director Renny Harlin teases the film as an unusual movie that could boost Joel Kinnaman's career.

tv.title: The Order
tv.announcement: Stephen Poliakoff returns to major TV drama with an epic historic political thriller.

tv.title: Superior
tv.announcement: Prime Video reveals young stars of German-language original series set in the world of luxury hotels.
